template.name: pw_scf_magn.in
pw_bands_magn.in

template.content:
&BANDS
    prefix = '__prefix__'
    outdir = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/outdir'{% endraw %}
    filband = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/bands_up.dat'{% endraw %}
    spin_component = 1
    no_overlap = .true.
/
template.name: bands_spin_up.in

template.content:
&BANDS
    prefix = '__prefix__'
    outdir = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/outdir'{% endraw %}
    filband = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/bands_dn.dat'{% endraw %}
    spin_component = 2
    no_overlap = .true.
/
template.name: bands_spin_dn.in
